node_fields.ss: self status code, -1 for non-self nodes
node_fields.cmo/cmi: minimum outgoing / incoming core k, 0 if none
node_fields.amo/ami: minimum outgoing / incoming async k, 0 if none
node_fields.mc: matrix cell: 0 virtual_distant, 1 virtual_supported, 2 mediated_real, 3 intrinsic_real
node_fields.psc: pair saturation class: II, IL, IR, LL, RR, LR
node_fields.pw: node passability weight derived from core and async degree/weight

edge_fields.cm/cw/ct: core min_k / weight_at_min_k / total_weight, 0 if absent
edge_fields.am/aw/at: async min_k / weight_at_min_k / total_weight, 0 if absent
